data.description: Well-known trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio posted on his personal TG channel: "The market may have entered the second phase yesterday. It is time to reposition."

data.title: Market Enters Second Phase, Says Top Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio
data.description: According to BlockBeats, top trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared insights on his personal channel, suggesting that the market may have entered its second phase yesterday. He emphasized that it is time to reassess strategies and make new moves in response to this development.

data.title: Zerebro Creator Jeffy Yu Found Alive After Faked Death Fuels Meme Coin Surge
data.description:
The 22-year-old dev behind $LLJEFFY was discovered alive days after a viral suicide video and obituary drove the token to a $105M market cap.
source: https://decrypt.co/318710/zerebro-creator-jeffy-yu-found-alive-faked-death-meme-coin-surge

data.title: Loopscale releases post-hacker attack report: withdrawal function has been restarted
data.description: Loopscale released a post-hacker report, revealing that hackers exploited a pricing logic vulnerability in the protocol, resulting in the unauthorized outflow of 5,726,724.97 USDC and 1,211.4 SOL from the USDC and SOL Genesis vaults. Currently, all funds have been recovered and the withdrawal function has been restarted.

data.title: US man who sent crypto to ISIS could serve prison till he’s 65
data.description:
A man from the US state of Virginia will spend over three decades behind bars after being convicted of sending crypto to the terrorist organization commonly known as the Islamic State of Iraq and Syria. Federal Judge David Novak sentenced Mohammed Azharuddin Chhipa to 30 years and four months in prison on May 7 for sending over $185,000 to the Islamic State, the Department of Justice said on May 8. Prosecutors said that from around October 2019 until October 2022, the 35-year-old Chhipa collected and sent money to female Islamic State members in Syria, which helped them escape prison camps and funded fighting. The Justice Department said Chhipa would raise funds for the United Nations-designated terror organization through social media — receiving money online, or traveling hundreds of miles to accept donations in person
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/man-funded-isis-crypto-gets-over-30-years-prison?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Solana's Loopscale Recovers Funds After Security Breach
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Solana-based lending protocol Loopscale has released a report on a recent security incident. An attacker exploited a pricing logic flaw to borrow 5,726,700 USDC and 1,211.4 SOL. All funds have been successfully recovered through negotiations.

The incident was caused by a code path that inadequately verified the price of RateX PT tokens, which was deployed without a third-party audit. Loopscale has apologized for the breach and committed to enhancing security measures. These measures include mandatory third-party audits, launching a bug bounty program, increasing multi-signature authorization, and setting borrowing and withdrawal limits.

data.title: Gate.io CandyDrop launches SHM airdrop event, with the highest prize pool of 140112 SHM
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io CandyDrop is launching the SHM airdrop event from 11:00 on May 9 to 10:00 on May 26 (UTC+8). Users who participate in spot trading and contract trading can share the 140,112 SHM airdrop prize pool.
It is reported that the threshold of this CandyDrop SHM airdrop event is low. SHM spot trading volume reaches 50 USDT, and SHM contract trading volume reaches 500 USDT to share the prize pool. The event is fair and open, and both new and old users can participate. A single person can get up to 2,000 SHM airdrops.

data.title: CSGO Item Index Experiences Significant Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the CSGO item index has experienced a notable decrease, dropping from its peak of 2514 on May 6 to the current level of 1980, marking a decline of approximately 20%. Several of the most traded items on Steam have seen their prices nearly halved.

data.title: The crypto market rose sharply across the board, with ETH leading the way with a 20.81% increase, and BTC market value ranked among the top five global assets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On May 9, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market rose sharply across the board, with a 24-hour increase of about 5% to 20%. Among them, Ethereum (ETH) led the increase by 20.81%, rising to above $2,200. Bitcoin (BTC) rose 5.29% in 24 hours, once breaking through $104,000, returning to the $100,000 mark after three months, and its market value exceeded $2 trillion, surpassing Amazon to rank fifth in the world's asset market value.
At the same time, MAG7.ssi rose 9.23%, DEFI.ssi rose 15.26%, and MEME.ssi rose 15.07%.
Other bright spots include: Meme sector rose 15.57% in 24 hours, among which OFFICIAL TRUMP (TRUMP) and Pepe (PEPE) rose 22.97% and 31.38% respectively; AI sector rose 15.49%, and within the sector, Bittensor (TAO), Worldcoin (WLD) and Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) rose 11.20%, 14.12% and 47.81% respectively; DeFi sector rose 13.57%, Lido DAO (LDO), Ethena (ENA) and Uniswap (UNI) rose 20.45%, 24.36% and 25.32% respectively; NFT sector rose 12.82%, and Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) rose 20.05%.
In addition, the Layer2 sector rose by 11.63%, the Layer1 sector rose by 8.63%, and Cardano (ADA) rose by 12.27%; the PayFi sector rose by 7.85%, and the CeFi sector rose by 4.48%.
The crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiNFT, ssiAI, and ssiGameFi indices rose by 15.47%, 14.48%, and 14.09% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $16.1138 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for three consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 8, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was $16.1138 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of $3.1893 million. Currently, the total net inflow of ETH has reached $620 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of $19.3031 million. Currently, the total net inflow of FETH has reached $1.427 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is $7.219 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.74%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $2.452 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $117 million yesterday, with BlackRock ETF IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $69.0012 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 8, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$117 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$69.0012 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$44.355 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$35.3366 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.672 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$118.66 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.82%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$40.836 billion.

data.title: Ethereum jumps 20% after Pectra upgrade, marking largest gain in four years
data.description:
Ethereum has rallied since Tuesday's activation of the Pectra upgrade, the network’s most significant update since the 2022 Merge.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/353763/ethereum-jumps-after-pectra-upgrade-marking-largest-gain-in-four-years?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Microsoft publicly bans employees from using DeepSeek for the first time
data.description: Microsoft Vice Chairman and President Brad Smith said at a U.S. Senate hearing that an internal ban has been issued, prohibiting all employees from using the DeepSeek app (including desktop/mobile). Although DeepSeek is an open source model and companies can deploy it on their own to avoid data backflow, Microsoft pointed out that it still poses the risk of "spreading propaganda or generating unsafe code." It is worth noting that Microsoft has not completely banned competing products (such as Perplexity) in the Windows App Store, but Google apps (including Gemini) have quietly disappeared. (TechCrunch)

data.title: Metaplanet Issues $21.25 Million Zero-Coupon Bonds to Increase Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet has announced the issuance of zero-coupon bonds totaling $21.25 million. The funds raised from this issuance will be allocated to increasing the company's Bitcoin holdings.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that on May 7, Metaplanet invested $53.4 million to acquire an additional 555 Bitcoins. This move is part of the company's ongoing strategy to expand its cryptocurrency portfolio.

data.title: Metaplanet issues $21.25 million in zero-coupon bonds to increase Bitcoin holdings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Metaplanet, a Japanese listed company, announced today that it will issue zero-interest bonds totaling $21.25 million, and the funds raised will be used to increase its holdings of Bitcoin.
Previously, on May 7, Metaplanet once again spent $53.4 million to increase its holdings of 555 BTC.

data.title: Shib Wallet: The Smart Multichain Hub for All Your Crypto Assets
data.description:
In the early days of crypto, wallets were pretty basic—they stored your digital assets and that was about it. But as Web3 has evolved, so has the way we manage our crypto lives. Enter Shib Wallet: a smart, multichain wallet that does more than just hold your tokens. It helps you track your portfolio, automate transactions, interact with dApps, and stay connected to the Shiba Inu ecosystem—all in one place
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/05/09/shib-wallet-the-smart-multichain-hub-for-all-your-crypto-assets/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=shib-wallet-the-smart-multichain-hub-for-all-your-crypto-assets

data.title: Microsoft Restricts Employee Use of DeepSeek App Due to Security Concerns
data.description: According to PANews, Microsoft President Brad Smith announced during a Senate hearing that the company has prohibited its employees from using the DeepSeek application due to concerns over data security and the risk of propagating harmful content. Microsoft has not listed the app in its store. Although the DeepSeek R1 model was available for download on Azure, it was limited to open-source model deployment rather than an official application. Smith also disclosed that Microsoft had modified the DeepSeek model to eliminate potentially harmful content.

data.title: U.S. AI Leadership Requires Regulatory Changes, Says White House Official
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, David Sacks, the White House's head of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, emphasized the need to abolish AI dissemination rules from the Biden era to win the AI race. He stated that the Trump administration plans to implement simpler regulations to unleash American innovation and ensure the country's dominance in the AI sector.

Sacks highlighted that the United States should be the gold standard and preferred partner for allies and strategic partners in the AI field. He warned that if American companies are hindered by excessive regulations, foreign clients may be unable to purchase technology, potentially causing the U.S. to lose its global market share and influence. Despite these challenges, the U.S. aims to maintain its leadership while strengthening its technological framework worldwide.
